templates.label: Digital illustration

templates.label: Line Art

High detail, crisp edges, balanced composition, professional vector-like precision, printable coloring page aesthetic, ultra clean lines, no distortion, no extra objects, no anatomy changes, no pose changes, preserve original framing exactly.
